name.description: The name of the block type.

description.description: A brief description of the block type.

ID.description: Defines the ID properties for this block type. If not specified, the block type does not have an ID.

parentsWithout.description: A list of block names that cannot be parents if this block has an ID.

values.description: A list of allowed ID values for this block. If not given, any value is allowed.

asType.description: Specifies if the ID of the block should count as the block type. For example, components have specific definitions based on their ID. This means a script block needs to be defined with the name 'component <componentID>' as well as 'component' to cover all component types available with the 'values' attribute.

optional.description: Indicates whether the ID is optional for this block type. If false or not specified, the block must have an ID when the ID field is provided.

shouldHaveParent.description: Indicates if the block should have a parent block.

parents.description: A list of valid parent block types.

needsChildren.description: A list of required child block types.

softOverride.description: Indicates whether the block can be soft overridden in scripts.

isRoot.description: Indicates whether the block is a root document.

pattern.description: A list of regex patterns that can be used to match this block type.

noComma.description: Indicates whether the block parameters should not be followed by a comma.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether the block type is deprecated.

parameters.description: A list of parameters available for this block type.

#ref.description: A reference to another block parameter.

description.description: A brief description of what the parameter does.

allowedDuplicate.description: Indicates whether the parameter can be duplicated.

canBeEmpty.description: Indicates whether the parameter can be empty.

itemTypes.description: Specifies the type of item the parameter is associated with (e.g., 'vehicle', 'item', etc.). Only for item scripts.

parentsOnly.description: A list of parent block types for which this parameter is applicable.

required.description: Indicates whether the parameter is required.

default.description: The default value for the parameter if not specified.

type.description: The data type of the parameter.

values.description: A list of allowed values for the parameter.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether the parameter is deprecated.

needs.description: A list of conditions of other parameters that must be met for this parameter to be valid.

name.description: The name of the parameter that this condition depends on.

values.description: The values of the dependent parameter that must be met for this parameter to be valid.

valueToType.description: A mapping of values of the dependent parameter to the expected type of this parameter. For example, if the dependent parameter is 'type' and it has a value 'integer', then this parameter should be of type 'float'. The key is the value of the dependent parameter, and the value is the expected type of this parameter when the dependent parameter has that value.

children.description: A list of child blocks that must be present for this parameter to be valid.

incompatibleWith.description: List of other parameters which are incompatible with this one.
